text: More respect is due the little things that run the world.
author: E.O. Wilson

text: The beauty of woodland wildflowers is that they exist at all.
author: Roger Swain

text: 'Tis a strange Forest that has no rotten Wood in it...
author: Benjamin Franklin

text: Your leaf litter can be home to a rich assortment of native plants while it is fertilizing, mulching, and watering your land.
author: Doug Tallamy

text: All my hurts my garden spade can heal.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

text: All things seem possible in May.
author: Edwin Way Teale
